channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Begging, Manifesting and Dumb Luck: How Influencers Get Free Trips to Coachella  The New York Times
  5. Coachella Hot Shots: All the Highlights From Weekend One in the Desert  The Hollywood Reporter

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Iranian negotiator says ‘we will not bow to any threats’ as Trump says US navy will blockade strait of Hormuz - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Iranian negotiator says ‘we will not bow to any threats’ as Trump says US navy will blockade strait of Hormuz  The Guardian
  2. U.S. Official: Iran Rejects Demands to Stop Enriching Uranium, Funding Hamas, Hezbollah  Haaretz
  3. Ghalibaf says Trump’s latest threats will have no effect on Iranians  The Times of Israel
  4. Iran's Parliament Speaker Taunts White House Over Gas Prices and Blockade  Barron's
  5. Top Iran Politician Says U.S. Must Earn Iran’s Trust  WSJ
